article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages

briefs.title: Liquor manufacturers can now officially produce and sell non-alcoholic beverages at licensed facilities
briefs.summary: BC's LCRB has updated its rules to confirm that liquor manufacturers can use their licensed facilities to make, sell, and sample non-alcoholic drinks like soda, tonic, and de-alcoholized beverages. No approval or notification to the LCRB is needed to start.
briefs.article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages
